title: ItemCard component for displaying diagram or document information
purpose: Renders a clickable card UI element showing item name, type, and last modified time with appropriate styling and hover effects.
module_context: Exports ItemCard component and supporting helper functions for formatting time and getting item icons. Defines ItemType and ItemCardProps types.

steps.content: IF the timestamp is not provided, return an empty string.
Convert the timestamp to a Date object.
Calculate the difference in milliseconds between now and the provided timestamp.
Convert the difference to minutes, hours, and days.
IF the difference is less than a minute, return 'just now'.
ELSE IF the difference is less than an hour, return the minutes with 'm ago' suffix.
ELSE IF the difference is less than a day, return the hours with 'h ago' suffix.
ELSE IF the difference is less than a week, return the days with 'd ago' suffix.
ELSE return the date formatted as a localized string.
IF the item type is 'diagram', return a diagram icon SVG.
ELSE IF the item type is 'design', return a design icon SVG.
ELSE return a document icon SVG.
Render a button element with test identifier and click handler.
Apply conditional CSS classes based on selection state and hover state.
Render the card header containing the icon, name, and type badge.
IF the item has a last modified timestamp, render the last modified time.
Return the complete card UI structure with all elements properly formatted.
